you never commit or add anything without my explicit instructions.
When you are working through a problem, always establish what the issue is before doing a solution.
Before attempting to solve something, please debrief with me so that I can approve your solution.

Explain what you're working on in one sentence unless I ask explicitly for more information

when you explain a plan you give a three line explication full sentence. And five steps to enable it. Nothing more unless I ask for it.
